voice_observations.caption_text:
Come Together with @greceghanem and @cheyenne.el.khoury The mother-daughter duo tells Level Shoes about home, their friendship, making what they create warmer, stronger, and more authentic.

Grece wears Toteme and Cheyenne wears Rotate. Discover more at the link in our bio.

Shot at @arthausbeirut
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Home is where your heart is. It can be in a memory, it can be in a place. I'm Grace, I'm a fashion model and a content creator. Most of all the mother of Cheyenne. I'm Cheyenne, I'm the other half of Grease Ganem. My mom, she is confident, she is very resilient and caring. Cheyenne is very creative. Perfectionist animal lover. Coming together makes what we create warmer, stronger and more authentic. Over the years I learned a lot of things from Cheyenne. I really appreciate her opinion and value it so much whether it is in our work or in our day life. Home is not necessarily only your environment but it's the people. What makes you feel home is what gives you this sense of peace and comfort and warmth. If I were to be a shoe, I would say a sling bag. I think I'd be a ballerina. Style guru, partner in crime, mother, best friend. She has my back, she's my sunshine and she's my everything.
notable_phrases: Come Together with and .el.khoury The mother-daughter duo tells Level Shoes about home, their friendship, making what they create warmer, stronger, and more authentic
Grece wears Toteme and Cheyenne wears Rotate. Discover more at the link in our bio
